title: Cluster-wide GPU utilisation snapshot
difficulty_justification: Two-step plan: slurm.list_nodes to enumerate gpu-partition members, then telemetry.query_timeseries aggregated across those nodes for the last hour - sequential calls but no branching.
query_text: Give me the average GPU utilisation across every node in the gpu partition over the last hour. Round to one decimal.

eval_criteria.gold_answer: Average gpu_util_pct across the 12 nodes in the gpu partition over the trailing 60 minutes is 67.4%.

checkpoints.description: Agent retrieves the node list and filters to gpu-partition members.
checkpoints.binary_pass_condition: trace contains slurm.list_nodes whose result is filtered by partition=gpu

checkpoints.description: Agent calls telemetry.query_timeseries with metric_name=gpu_util_pct over the last hour.
checkpoints.binary_pass_condition: trace contains telemetry.query_timeseries(metric_name=gpu_util_pct) with time-range spanning <=60 minutes
